response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience and strong open-source contributions in geospatial systems via GISCollective, which aligns with the role’s domain, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing or navigation pipelines, and shows no evidence of distributed systems work at scale for geospatial data — critical for this role.
strengths: Proven geospatial experience via open-source GISCollective platform
Strong track record in building scalable, event-driven data systems
Demonstrated ability to learn and contribute across diverse tech stacks
concerns: No demonstrated commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing or map tile pipelines
Lack of evidence in fault-tolerant distributed systems or real-time traffic integration
Primary languages listed are JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang, not the required C++/Rust
